_description: High-impact editorial card with a gradient background — 16:9 widescreen. Title sits on the left, subtitle on the right in a two-column layout. Best for short punchy titles (1–4 words).

_slots.title: REQUIRED — the bold display title. Shown at 148px. Keep it punchy. Put context in subtitle.
_slots.subtitle: optional — one sentence of supporting text shown to the right of the title
_slots.eyebrow: optional — small uppercase label with a decorative line shown above the title
_slots.colorA: optional — hex color for left of the gradient background (default: #1a0533)
_slots.colorB: optional — hex color for right of the gradient background (default: #0d1f3c)
_slots.highlight: optional — hex accent color used for the eyebrow text, dot, and rule (default: #ff6b35)
_slots.image: optional — path or https:// URL. Used as a full-bleed background image behind the gradient.
_slots.cta: optional — call-to-action text shown at the bottom

title: The Future Deck

slides.title: NOW
slides.subtitle: Everything you thought would take a decade is happening this year.

slides.title: SHIP FAST
slides.subtitle: A good product shipped today beats a perfect product shipped never.

slides.title: BUILD
slides.subtitle: Ideas are worthless without execution. Start before you're ready.

slides.title: RISE
slides.subtitle: Great things are built one day at a time.
